consumeBountiesOnDamage and recordBountyLootBoost are no-op stubs marked @deprecated

fetchGenerationRecord is a stub returning hardcoded empty data ({ lastStudiedAt: null, keyConcepts: [], summary: { overview: '' } })
Entire file is empty barrel with comment 'Currently no hooks are defined — hooks will be added as integration transitions from stub status'

findElementsByRole, findFocusableElements, findDynamicElements, findAnimatedElements, findColorOnlyElements all return empty arrays — zero functionality
respectsReducedMotion always returns true, hasLogicalTabOrder always returns true — no actual checks
Entire file is a stub animation system — createAnimatedValue/createTiming/easingOut implement fake animation API
getQueuedEvents() always returns empty array — no actual event queue
getUserFirstOpen always returns null — hardcoded stub
